# Module 00 References

## Primary

- **[AWS DEA-C01 Exam Guide](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/certified-data-engineer-associate/)** — Sections cited: Introduction, Target Candidate Description, Exam content, Content outline, In-Scope AWS Services, Out-of-Scope AWS Services.
- [AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate (product page)](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/certified-data-engineer-associate/) — canonical certification landing page.
- [AWS Certification portal](https://www.aws.training/certification) — scheduling and score history.
- [AWS Certification Policies - Before testing](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/policies/before-testing/) — Pearson VUE + OnVUE delivery, ID requirements, retake policy.

## Study and mock exam resources

- The 12-week study plan for this branch is described in the [parent README](../README.md).
- Mock exam sets 1 and 2 -- see [mock_exam_sources.md](../mock_exam_sources.md) for available practice resources.
- [AWS Skill Builder](https://skillbuilder.aws/) -- official AWS practice question sets for DEA-C01.

## Unified course

- Unified course plan -- AWS vendor branch scope (100-130h).
- Unified course reuse policy -- citation policy enforced here.
